svg.text: 2-layer deep linear network: ŷ = W₂ · W₁ · x
The key: W = W₂W₁ decomposes via SVD of Y'X

g.text: singular values in S encode hierarchy levels

svg.text: Singular modes are learned sequentially, largest first:
Each mode is a "phase" — transitions between them drive the influence dynamics
Larger singular value = learned earlier = coarser distinction
